content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Drc1cover.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Droids (1986) 1|''Droids'' (1986) 1]] released in 1986.]]
A list of events in '''1986''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Anna Brewster]] is born.
*[[January 4|04]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 133|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 133]] published.
*[[January 11|11]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 134|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 134]] published.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 135|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 135]] published.
*[[January 25|25]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 136|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 136]] published.
* ?? – [[The Ewoks and the Magic Sunberries]] Ice capades show.
==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 137|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 137]] published.
*[[February 4|04]] – [[Ewoks 7|''Ewoks'' 7]] published.
*04 – [[Asif Ali]] is born.
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 138|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 138]] published.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 139|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 139]] published.
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 105|''Star Wars'' (1977) 105]] published.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 140|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 140]] published.
*?? – [[Marvel Comics]] begins its [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|Droids comic series]] with [[Droids (1986) 1|''Droids'' (1986) 1]].

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 141|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 141]] published.
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Stephen Byrne]] is born.
*[[March 8|08]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 142|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 142]] published.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 143|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 143]] published.
*[[March 18|18]] – [[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' 2]] published.
*[[March 22|22]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 144|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 144]] published.
*[[March 24|24]] – [[Jason Wong]] is born.
*[[March 29|29]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 145|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 145]] published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 8|''Ewoks'' (1985) 8]] published.
*[[April 5|05]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 146|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 146]] published.
*[[April 8|08]] – ''[[Fuzzy as an Ewok: Things to See, Touch, and Smell from the Forest Moon of Endor|Fuzzy as an Ewok]]'' published.
*[[April 8|08]] – ''[[Shiny as a Droid: Things to See, Touch, and Smell from a Galaxy Far, Far Away|Shiny as a Droid]]'' published.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 147|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 147]] published.
*[[April 15|15]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 106|''Star Wars'' (1977) 106]] published.
*[[April 19|19]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 148|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 148]] published.
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Marjorie Eaton]] dies.
*[[April 26|26]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 149|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 149]] published.

==May==
*[[May 3|03]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 150|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 150]] published.
*[[May 10|10]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 151|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 151]] published.
*[[May 12|12]] – [[Eugene Cordero]] is born.
*[[May 13|13]] – [[Droids (1986) 3|''Droids'' 3]] published.
*[[May 17|17]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 152|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 152]] published.
*[[May 24|24]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 153|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 153]] published.
*[[May 31|31]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 154|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 154]] published.
*31 – [[Lucas Parolin]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[The Pirates of Tarnoonga: A Droid Adventure]]'' published.
*[[June 3|03]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 9|''Ewoks'' (1985) 9]] published.
*[[June 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Droids'']] TV special ''[[The Great Heep]]'' aired.
*07 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 155|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 155]] published.
*[[June 17|17]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 107|''Star Wars'' (1977) 107]] published.

==July==
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' 4]] published.
*[[July 29|29]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 10|''Ewoks'' (1985) 10]] published.

==August==
*[[August 7|07]] – [[Jordan Maison]] is born.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Zachary Graves]] is born.
*[[August 17|17]] – [[Bryton James]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 3|03]] – [[Robert Stambler]] is born.
*[[September 7|07]] – [[Tyrone Kearns]] is born.
*[[September 13|13]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Crystal Cloak]]" aired.
*13 – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Wish Plant]]" aired.
*[[September 16|16]] – [[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' 5]] published.
*[[September 20|20]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Home is Where the Shrieks Are]]" aired.
*20 – ''Ewoks'': "[[Princess Latara]]" aired.
*[[September 27|27]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Raich]]" aired.
*[[September 30|30]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]] published.

==October==
*[[October 3|03]] – [[Joonas Suotamo]] is born.
*[[October 4|04]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Totem Master]]" aired.
*04 – ''Ewoks'': "[[A Gift for Shodu]]" aired.
*[[October 11|11]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Night of the Stranger]]" aired.
*[[October 18|18]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Gone With the Mimphs]]" aired.
*18 – ''Ewoks'': "[[The First Apprentice]]" aired.
*[[October 23|23]] – [[Emilia Clarke]] is born.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Katerina Belikova]] is born.
*[[October 25|25]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Hard Sell]]" aired.
*25 – ''Ewoks'': "[[A Warrior and a Lurdo]]" aired.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Season Scepter]]" aired.
*[[November 8|08]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Prow Beaten]]" aired.
*08 – ''Ewoks'': "[[Baga's Rival]]" aired.
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Josh Peck]] is born.
*[[November 15|15]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]]" aired.
*15 – ''Ewoks'': "[[The Tragic Flute]]" aired.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Droids (1986) 6|''Droids'' 6]] published.
*[[November 22|22]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Just My Luck]]" aired.
*22 – ''Ewoks'': "[[Bringing Up Norky]]" aired.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Daniel M. Lavery]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 2|02]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 12|''Ewoks'' (1985) 12]] published.
*[[December 6|06]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Battle for the Sunstar]]" aired.
*[[December 13|13]] – ''Ewoks'': "[[Party Ewok]]" aired.
*13 – ''Ewoks'': "[[Malani the Warrior]]" aired.
*[[December 19|19]] – [[Luke Cook]] is born.
*[[December 28|28]] – ''[[George Lucas' Star Tours]]'' 18-minute promotional film released on television.

==Unknown==
*''[[The Ewok Who Was Afraid: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[The Red Ghost: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[The Ring, the Witch, and the Crystal: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[The Shadow Stone: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[Wicket Goes Fishing: An Ewok Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[The White Witch: A Droid Adventure]]'' published.
*''[[Escape from the Monster Ship: A Droid Adventure]]'' published.
*[[Viz Media]] is founded.

----
